E737 - Long Train Journey
programme.desc: Daddy Pig receives a letter saying he must go away on business to test some very important concrete!

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E101 - Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: E102 - Pups Save The Sea Turtles / Pups And The Very Big Baby
programme.desc: Ryder, Chase, and Rubble hatch a plan to help sea turtle hatchlings safely cross the road to get to the beach! // There's a beached baby whale in Adventure Bay! Can the Paw Patrol work together to reunite it with its mother?

programme.title: E208 - Walky Talky
programme.desc: Tim tries to return a lost walky talky to it's owner.

programme.title: E102 - Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: E711 - Easter Bunny
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are on the lookout for Easter eggs at Rebecca Rabbit's House!

programme.title: E208 - Walky Talky
programme.desc: Tim tries to return a lost walky talky to it's owner.

programme.title: E102 - Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: E102 - Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: E418 - Pups Save A City Kitty / Pups Save A Cloud Surfer
programme.desc: Cali gets lost in the woods. // Daring Danny X's harness loosens while kite-surfing.

programme.title: E101 - Lucky Croc / Sleepover Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. // When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: E208 - Walky Talky
programme.desc: Tim tries to return a lost walky talky to it's owner.

programme.title: E102 - Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: E102 - Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: E743 - The Carnival
programme.desc: The Carnival has come to town and it's a chance to see all sorts of exciting things! There is Mr. Bull's Jazz Band, Miss Rabbit as the Carnival Queen and even a very special appearance from Mr. Potato, showing off his very large balloon!

programme.title: E115 - Zero Waste
programme.desc: When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E223 - The Crew Builds A Kangaroo Safari / The Crew Plays In The Construction Game
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: E407 - Rise Of The Sub-Zero Sub / Balloon Bonanza
programme.desc: Baron Bite steals a submarine from Sir Steel and turns it into a Sub-Zero Sub giving him freedom! // The Deer Squad's planet powers bring Trick Alien's giant balloon animals to life.

programme.title: E306 - The Crew Builds A Giant Turtle House / The Crew Builds A Giant Volcano
programme.desc: It's Friend Appreciation Day! But when Speed Meister's gift for Mr. McTurtle goes awry, he has to call Rubble & Crew for help. / Rubble & Crew help Lucas make the most awesome Science Fair volcano ever. But will Wingsy get in the way of the eruption?

programme.title: E103 - Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: E415 - The Flying Lion
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are excited to play with their new friend Roarian, the Flying Lion! But when Roarian loses his magical sunstone, he turns into a statue! Now it's up to Blaze and AJ to find the sunstone and restore Roarian's powers!

programme.title: E306 - The Crew Builds A Giant Turtle House / The Crew Builds A Giant Volcano

programme.desc: Peppa, George, Rebecca and Richard Rabbit have so much fun playing with their marble run. When Daddy Pig joins in, the marble run gets much bigger!

programme.title: E813 - World Book Day
programme.desc: It is World Book Day at playgroup but Peppa has so many favourite books she just cannot decide which to go as!

programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.

programme.title: E171
programme.desc: Through the captivating stories presented in We Are One, the viewers can fully immerse themselves in the narratives and witness the genuine emotions that arise between humans and animals. These emotions are rooted in love and go beyond mere boundaries, showcasing the remarkable power of love in forging meaningful connections.

programme.title: E158
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E428
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.desc: Ace Vampire slayer Reeve and his new partner Gipsy are on this mission, however Reeve's younger sister Helen falls in love with the Vampire fifth prince Kazaf.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E285 -Cold War 1994

programme.title: One Second
programme.desc: China during the Cultural Revolution. A prisoner escapes from a labour camp. He risks everything in his search for a stolen film reel in which his long-lost daughter appears – for one second. Soon he encounters the thief, an orphaned girl haunted by her own terrible loss.

programme.title: Kung Fu Master Is My Grandma!
programme.desc: Gucci, an ordinary teenage girl grows up in a single-parent family. In order to protect her good friend, she fights with somebody and is sent to girls' home. After release, she knows her mother died in a car accident. So she doesn't have a choice but to live with her weird grandmother, Wong Fei Hung. Gucci does not like Wong's old-fashion and strange character and they always quarrel about some unimportant issues. Gucci has fallen in love with a bartender. However, happy times always can't last, bad luck seems still follow Gucci......

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E98 - Menswear For Autumn/Winter 2023-2024
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E12 - Amsterdam With Alain Caron
programme.desc: The most Dutch of French chefs, Alain Caron, a real celebrity in the Netherlands, guides us across the canals of Amsterdam, his adopted home. A perfect opportunity to discover the festive, gourmet world of a restaurateur who has given French cuisine a voice in the local version of ''MasterChef''.

programme.title: E34 - Gipuzkoa/Wildlife/Ur Yoko
programme.desc: Coming up: a visit to the province of Gipuzkoa in the Basque Country; a focus on the wildlife care center in Ustaritz; a meeting with the Ur Yoko rowing club in Saint-Jean-de-Luz.

programme.title: E13 - Megeve With Emmanuel Renaut (1/2)
programme.desc: Emmanuel Renaut is a competitor at heart: a three-star chef and Meilleur Ouvrier de France, this workaholic never stops. From the Aiguille du Midi in Haute-Savoie to the Vallee de Joux in Switzerland, via Megeve and Chamonix, we'll be tasting his mountain cuisine with him.

programme.title: E108
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E3 - Children of the Storm
programme.desc: In Iceland only one out of six cubs has survived. Abandoned by her parents, she now has to fend for herself. The reindeer herd swim two miles across open water. In Scotland, 35,000 grey seals arrive for their annual breeding season.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: E1 - January-February - the Year Begins
programme.desc: In the early months of the year, the Earth’s axial tilt brings the height of summer in some places and the depths of winter in others. See how life struggles to survive under these extreme conditions.

programme.title: E2 - March-April - a Time of Renewal
programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

programme.title: E2 - Sanctuary of the Indian Ocean
programme.desc: On Africa's east coast, the warm Agulhas run south with a distinctive subtropical landscape. Made up of everything from mangrove swamps to colorful coral reefs, the area has marine turtles - who breed on long and warm sandy beaches - and a recently found population of 'living fossils', the Coelacanth, which dwell in deep, submarine canyons.

programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

programme.title: E1 - January-February - the Year Begins

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Take a journey through the eyes of catfish, ocelots, and other native creatures with narrator Matthew McConaughey. Celebrate the Lone Star State’s landscapes and wildlife, and learn how crucial conservation efforts can save Texas’ unique habitats.

programme.title: E3 - Growing Pains
programme.desc: Experience a roller coaster of emotions and growing pains as the sanctuary’s orangutans move through six grades toward their release into the wild. Discover how Dilla’s fate suddenly changes, and watch as big boy Beni goes on an unwelcome diet.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E2 - Sanctuary of the Indian Ocean
programme.desc: On Africa's east coast, the warm Agulhas run south with a distinctive subtropical landscape. Made up of everything from mangrove swamps to colorful coral reefs, the area has marine turtles - who breed on long and warm sandy beaches - and a recently found population of 'living fossils', the Coelacanth, which dwell in deep, submarine canyons.

programme.title: E3 - Children of the Storm
programme.desc: In Iceland only one out of six cubs has survived. Abandoned by her parents, she now has to fend for herself. The reindeer herd swim two miles across open water. In Scotland, 35,000 grey seals arrive for their annual breeding season.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: E10 - 林依晨鄭元暢再合體
programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E6 - 霸總用爆燈搶心儀求職者
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E58

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a messy guest, a cracked egg, a hoppy friend & a ruined teddy! Jeff meets a cute but very messy Floofer & has to learn to live with his new friend's untidy habits. Then, Lulu finds a colorful egg, & when it cracks, a cute chick hatches that she doesn't want to let go! The challenges continue as Newt tries to nurse an injured Oddfrog back to health & Pogo feels guilty after accidentally ruining Newt's teddy bear-shaped hedge.

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Kapamilya Daily Mass[Live]
programme.desc: A daily celebration of the Liturgy of the Lord with Fr. Tito Caluag. Join us as we reflect on the goodness of God in this healing mass.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: E6 - Lima
programme.desc: Lima is known as the Garden City, but driving here definitely isn't a walk in the park.

programme.title: E4 - Gareth Southgate
programme.desc: In Bear’s Mission with Gareth Southgate, the leader of the Three Lions squad will swap the football field for some of the UK’s toughest terrain and tackle the ultimate challenge, as he joins Bear on a mission across the wilds of Dartmoor.

programme.title: E6 - Lima
programme.desc: Lima is known as the Garden City, but driving here definitely isn't a walk in the park.

programme.title: E3 - Burmese Pythons
programme.desc: If you asked experts what the most prevalent predator species in the United States is, without hesitation, the answer would be the Burmese pythons in the Florida Everglades. Growing up to 26-feet long and weighing as much as 200 pounds, the Burmese python has completely altered the ecosystem of the Everglades by eliminating over 99% of the native mammal population. To save the 'Glades, the hunter has become the hunted as Dusty 'Wildman' Crum has made it his mission to eradicate this species. Luckily for Yia, python is considered a delicacy in many countries, and Dusty believes these constrictors should be restricted to life on a plate, which helps take a bite out of the problem.

programme.title: E4 - Green Iguanas
programme.desc: A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60's and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. Free to roam the canals, parks, and suburban neighborhoods, these pets-gone-feral have exploded in both size and population, causing hundreds of millions of dollars of damage a year in Florida. Urban hunter Michael Onega is doing his part to clean up the environment by removing as many iguanas as possible, limiting their population spread. The singular goal - to make sure the iguanas never establish a healthy breeding population in the Everglades. Yia joins Michael and his trusty Labrador Scout on Michael's mud boat, as they patrol the canals in Michael's backyard. The only thing better than Scout retrieving the fallen iguanas, are BBQed iguana and iguana tacos cooked up in Michael's backyard.

Luckily for Yia, python is considered a delicacy in many countries, and Dusty believes these constrictors should be restricted to life on a plate, which helps take a bite out of the problem.

programme.title: E4 - Green Iguanas
programme.desc: A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60's and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. Free to roam the canals, parks, and suburban neighborhoods, these pets-gone-feral have exploded in both size and population, causing hundreds of millions of dollars of damage a year in Florida. Urban hunter Michael Onega is doing his part to clean up the environment by removing as many iguanas as possible, limiting their population spread. The singular goal - to make sure the iguanas never establish a healthy breeding population in the Everglades. Yia joins Michael and his trusty Labrador Scout on Michael's mud boat, as they patrol the canals in Michael's backyard. The only thing better than Scout retrieving the fallen iguanas, are BBQed iguana and iguana tacos cooked up in Michael's backyard.

programme.title: E11 - Horns Up
programme.desc: Billy and his partner Shaun respond to a frat house where an animal prank is no longer funny. Then Billy saves a family from an infestation of flying squirrels.

programme.desc: In Bear’s Mission with Gareth Southgate, the leader of the Three Lions squad will swap the football field for some of the UK’s toughest terrain and tackle the ultimate challenge, as he joins Bear on a mission across the wilds of Dartmoor.

programme.title: E56
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: The Legend of Speed
programme.desc: After winning yet another race, the underground drag car racer king, Sky, was framed by his rival's brother Fung. On the run in Thailand, Sky hooks up with his long lost father, himself a legendary racer, who steers his son back on course for the ultimate showdown of speed with Fung.

programme.title: Parking Service
programme.desc: Stanley was an optimistic youth, feeling bored in his pig-rearing job, he decided to part with his beloved uncle and aunt and seek for an ideal job to achieve his own goal in life. He then found a job in Tsim Sha Tsui East. There he worked as a member of a parking service team and befriended one of his colleagues Ah Man. Ah Man was a reticent guy who was always frustrated by reality. The problem that he could not afford his sister to further studies in oversea puzzled him now and then. His anxiety was intensified by his sorrowful devotion to a mysterious beautiful girl Stella. Stanley was enthusiastic to help Ah Man to be acquainted with Stella. This made Ah Man live in high spirits. Stanley also encouraged his colleagues to work with enthusiasm. Their team was therefore rewarded with more tips by customers. A member of another team was a man of misconduct who stole spare parts and valuables from customer's cars. Mr. Yang, was a man who made fake banknotes...
